title: SV: IVL_UVM - virtual task call leads to crash
code_blocks:
iverilog -DVW_IVLOG_GO2UVM -DIVL_UVM -g2012 -I../../ivl_uvm_src -o vw_ivl_go2uvm.vvp  -f f.t 2>&1 | tee go2uvm_comp.log
